results.title: Sunil Gavaskar hits out at IPL broadcasters' time management post-match, calls for breathing space for losing captains
results.description: Sunil Gavaskar has backed Lucknow Super Giants captain Rishabh Pant's ‘F’ word outburst after their IPL 2026 match against Rajasthan Royals. The former Indian captain slammed the broadcasters' time management skills.

results.title: Rays OF Jonny DeLuca (hamstring) out 6-8 weeks
results.description: May 20, 2026; St. Petersburg, Florida, USA; Tampa Bay Rays right fielder Jonny DeLuca (21) makes a diving catch against the Baltimore Orioles in the third inning at Tropicana Field. Mandatory Credit: Nathan Ray Seebeck-Imagn Images Tampa Bay Rays outfielder Jonny DeLuca will be sidelined six to eight weeks with a Grade 1 right hamstring [...] The post Rays OF Jonny DeLuca (hamstring) out 6-8 weeks appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: May 13, 2026; Chicago, Illinois, USA; Chicago White Sox right fielder Jarred Kelenic (24) runs after hitting a two-run double against the Kansas City Royals during the fifth inning at Rate Field. Mandatory Credit: Kamil Krzaczynski-Imagn Images
results.description: The Chicago White Sox have moved on from Jarred Kelenic, calling up utility man Rikuu Nishida to make his big league debut in the process.

results.title: Coach Samuel Boadu set to join Aduana FC
results.description: Experienced Ghanaian coach Samuel Boadu is set to join Aduana FC following the expiration of his contract with Berekum Chelsea, GHANAsoccernet.com can exclusively report.The 2021 Ghana Premier League-winning coach with Hearts of Oak is expected to replace Cioba Aristica ahead of the 2026-27 season.Boadu is expected to join the Ogya team after leaving Berekum Chelsea after their final league game of the season, a 2-1 loss to champions Medeama SC. The club finished 14th on the league table with 42 points from 34 games.Boadu joined the Blues in January 2025 after a short stint at Raja Casablanca as the club's assistant coach, a position he left in October 2024. He had previously been linked with a return to Hearts of Oak, where he won the Ghana Premier League and FA Cup double in 2021 before being dismissed in October 2022.Aduana FC, who finished 9th on the league table in the just-ended season, will be hoping Boadu's experience and proven track record can help them challenge for honours.The Dormaa-based club ended the season with 14 wins, 10 draws, and 10 defeats in 34 matches. Boadu is expected to bring his attacking philosophy and tactical discipline to...

results.title: ‘Road to Omaha’ for Arkansas begins on the road against rival
results.description: The Arkansas Razorbacks’ ‘Road to Omaha’ begins on the road for the first time since 2022.

results.title: Teenager Blades Brown debating temporary PGA Tour membership
results.description: Teenager Blades Brown has a decision to make about his golf career. With his T14 finish on Sunday at the CJ Cup Byron Nelson in McKinney, Texas, Brown earned a special temporary membership on the PGA Tour for the remainder of 2026.
